creator: johnjomurphy+bugz@gmail.com
text:
This bug seems to have disappeared with an upgrade to 
LibreOffice 6.3.3.2.0 30(Build:2) today.

However, I hesitate to say it's fixed because the upgrade to LO came as a result of installing krita 4.2.7.1. That install upgraded a number of other programs such as Inkscape, poppler etc - so the fix may have been in one of the associated libraries. I don't have the expertise to find out for sure - so I'll leave it to those more expert.

Anyway, good to see it's fixed; didn't realise how much I depended on previews.
